summary: Completed i18n/translation system testing. All major translation features are working correctly. Tested Arabic (ae/Dubai), Albanian (xk/Kosovo), Turkish (tr), French (fr), and Greek (el) languages. Navbar, status bar, CyberHero section, and footer translations all verified. Fixed one minor issue in Footer.js where 'VIP Auktionen' was hardcoded instead of using translation.

fallback_mechanism.test: Greek (el) language - missing keys fall back to German
fallback_mechanism.details: Verified that when translations are missing (e.g., Leaderboard in Greek), the system falls back to German ('Rangliste') instead of showing raw keys

mobile_menu.details: Mobile menu translations verified for German and Arabic - all nav items properly translated

fixes_applied.fix: Changed to use translation: {ft.vipMembership || t('nav.vipAuctions') || 'VIP Auktionen'}

critical_code_review_comments: Translation system is well-implemented with proper fallback mechanism
All major UI components have proper i18n support
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n/translation system fully tested and working. All languages (Arabic/ae, Albanian/xk, Turkish/tr, French/fr, German/de) properly translate navbar, status bar, CyberHero section, and footer. Fallback mechanism verified - missing translations fall back to German. One minor fix applied to Footer.js for hardcoded VIP text.
